name: libtext-glob-perl
title: libtext-glob-perl
summary: Perl module for matching globbing patterns against text
description:
Perl module for matching globbing patterns against text
Text::Glob implements glob(3) style matching that can be used to match
against text, rather than fetching names from a filesystem.  If you
want to do full file globbing use the File::Glob module instead.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtext-glob-perl because Perl module for matching globbing patterns against text.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtext-glob-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtext-glob-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtext-glob-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
